description: Log in to Rocket.Chat (admin/Admin1234!) and create a new discussion named "Upgrade Planning Discussion" based on the most recent release announcement message in the #release-updates channel. The discussion should include the initial message: "Team, let's discuss whether we should upgrade to this release. Please share your thoughts on compatibility and timeline."

metadata.initial_message_text: Team, let's discuss whether we should upgrade to this release. Please share your thoughts on compatibility and timeline.
